results.title: Challenger CGF: Why Is It Back in the Retirement Income Debate?
results.description: Challenger stays in focus as annuity demand, rates and longevity planning shape Australia’s retirement income debate.

results.title: US attacks Iran and Tehran retaliates across the Middle East as both vie for control of strait
results.description: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — The U.S. launched strikes on Iran early Tuesday morning, hours after President Donald Trump said Washington is “reinstating” a blockade on Iran in the Strait of Hormuz .

results.title: US CENTCOM Strikes Bushehr And Bandar As Iran Conflict Raises Fears Of Wider Regional War | News18
results.description: | The U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) says American forces have struck key military sites in Iran's Bushehr and Bandar regions, marking another major escalation in the conflict. With the Strait of Hormuz remaining a critical flashpoint for global shipping and energy supplies, fears are growing that the confrontation could expand into a wider regional crisis. Watch the full report for the latest military developments, geopolitical analysis, and international reactions. n18oc_breaking-news News18 Mobile App - https://onelink.to/desc-youtube

results.title: What injured athletes can teach us about recovery and resilience
results.description: FLAGSTAFF, Ariz. (AP) — Serious injuries and medical conditions disrupt people's daily routines and can impact their confidence and sense of identity. Elite athletes know the challenges from an injury that sidelines them from their sport, requires physical rehabilitation and leaves their ability to return to competition in doubt.
